goal: Add a local CSV export for the existing audit summary panel without introducing new reporting contracts.

aiLeverageDecisionLens.realUserOrOperator: workspace admin preparing weekly review notes
aiLeverageDecisionLens.statusQuoWorkaround: manual copy of visible audit rows
aiLeverageDecisionLens.humanTeamEffortForFullScope: about one day for an engineer to implement, test, and document the local export
aiLeverageDecisionLens.ccAgentEffortForFullScope: about 30 minutes for visible-row CSV export plus targeted test and lint
aiLeverageDecisionLens.aiCompressionRatio: roughly 10x for the bounded local export path
aiLeverageDecisionLens.completeLakeBoundary: visible-row CSV export, panel action, current data source, targeted panel test, and lint
aiLeverageDecisionLens.oceanBoundary: JSON export, scheduled reporting, shared reporting backend, and cross-panel reporting platform

costModel.maintenanceCost: low while scoped to visible rows

aiLeverageDecisionLens.impactOnApprovedDirection: complete the local visible-row export lake while deferring reporting platform work

externalBestPractice.privacyGuard: generalized terms only; no project names, private requirements, customer names, secrets, logs, or proprietary concepts
externalBestPractice.skippedReason: the local handoff exports existing visible rows and does not introduce a new reporting standard

knownEvidence: Existing admin panel already owns the visible summary rows
No reporting backend is needed for the first useful export

options.label: Tiny design CSV export
options.good: Solves weekly reporting friction with the current panel data
options.costRisk: Does not handle JSON, scheduling, or shared reporting contracts

options.label: Shared reporting pipeline
options.good: Could support more formats and future scheduled reports
options.costRisk: Creates a larger platform surface before the local export is proven

decisionQuestions.impact: cc-do exports only visible rows from the current panel and avoids new reporting contracts

tasks.title: [TEST] Add a failing test for the missing download action
acceptance: the missing download action is reproduced as a failing test

notes: stay inside the current audit summary panel

testSeam.behaviorAsserted: the missing download action is reproduced as a failing test
testSeam.specStyleTestName: the missing download action is reproduced as a failing test
testSeam.publicVerificationPath: Run the audit summary panel test and observe CSV export through visible rows

tasks.title: [IMPL] Add the download summary action
acceptance: admins can trigger a CSV download from the existing summary panel

notes: reuse visible summary rows as the export source

testSeam.behaviorAsserted: admins can trigger a CSV download from the existing summary panel
testSeam.specStyleTestName: admins can trigger a CSV download from the existing summary panel
testSeam.publicVerificationPath: Run the audit summary panel test and observe CSV export through visible rows

tasks.title: Run targeted checks and collect handoff evidence
acceptance: fresh verification evidence exists for local handoff

notes: remote push is intentionally out of scope for this example

testSeam.behaviorAsserted: fresh verification evidence exists for local handoff
testSeam.specStyleTestName: fresh verification evidence exists for local handoff
testSeam.publicVerificationPath: Run the audit summary panel test and observe CSV export through visible rows
